svg.text: Chat Server Architecture — IOCP + Logic Thread Model
Worker Thread x N : IOCP I/O completions
Logic Thread x 1 : GameLoop + Handler dispatch
Workers produce → MPSC Queue → Logic consumes
IOCP Workers(N) → MPSC Queue → Logic Thread(1) → Handlers run serially
No mutex needed on game state — all handlers are single-threaded
Drains ALL queued packets per tick → batch processing
highp-mmorpg / chat-server architecture — IOCP + Single Logic Thread Model
